prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角形象描述提示词：**

A handsome young male detective named Sherlock Chen, full-body character design, standing centered on pure white background. Extremely attractive with delicate facial features and clear skin. Deep curly black hair styled elegantly, with profound dark eyes that show keen observation and focused expression. High-bridged nose and refined jawline showcase his outstanding temperament. Tall and slender physique with graceful posture.

Wearing a sophisticated dark charcoal wool overcoat that reaches mid-thigh, perfectly tailored to his lean frame. Underneath, a crisp white dress shirt with subtle texture, paired with a slim dark tie. Well-fitted dark trousers and polished black leather dress shoes. The coat flows naturally, suggesting movement and elegance.

His penetrating gaze demonstrates exceptional observational skills, with slightly furrowed brows indicating deep concentration. Hands positioned naturally at his sides, one slightly raised as if gesturing during deduction. Overall appearance exudes intelligence, sophistication, and the aura of a modern London detective.

Rendered in impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes creating atmospheric depth and artistic texture. The lighting emphasizes his striking features and the flowing lines of his elegant attire.

Full-body character design, pure white background, figure centered, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
